claims.evidence_text: Small grains can still show good response to N topdressed at this time, although yield responses will be better at Feekes 5.0 as head size can no longer be affected by fertilizer application.
claims.claim_summary: Nitrogen topdress response best around Feekes 5.0; head size no longer affected by later fertilizer

claims.evidence_text: Nitrogen applications at Feekes 8.0 and later can enhance grain protein levels, but are questionable with respect to added yield.
claims.claim_summary: Late N (Feekes 8.0+) boosts grain protein but not yield

claims.evidence_text: Irrigation scheduling becomes most critical between Feekes 8.0 and mid-grain (Feekes 11.1). The crop should not be stressed from about 10 days prior to bloom through the late milk stage.
claims.claim_summary: Most drought/irrigation-critical period from Feekes 8.0 to mid-grain (10 days pre-bloom through late milk)
